sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74815" key="o)reilexh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρει-λεχής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n74815.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">couching on the hills,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λέοντες</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:127:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">127.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
